name: Fire Monks
Mt. Gelmir Mountaintops of the Giants Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave
Mountaintops of the Giants:
Giant-Conquering Hero's Grave:
Monk's Flameblade Fire Monk Hood Fire Monk Armor Fire Monk Gauntlets Fire Monk Greaves Smoldering Butterfly Fire Blossom
Fire Monk is an enemy in ELDEN RING (2022) .
Warrior-monks who reside in the Mountaintops of the Giants . During the War Against the Giants , the Fire Monks fought on behalf of the Erdtree . They devised " Flame, Protect Me ", an incantation which shielded the champions of the Erdtree from the Giants' Flame . [ 1 ] After the war had concluded, the flame of ruin was sealed away, and the Fire Monks were appointed to watch over it. [ 2 ] [ 3 ] They were led in this ordeal by the Fire Prelates [ 4 ] , and in turn led the Guilty ; exiled criminals who wielded thorn sorceries .
After many years, the Fire Monks succumbed to the allure of the flame of ruin [ 5 ] , beguiled by it. [ 6 ] Wielding fire -based incantations , the Fire Monks continued to keep watch over the flame, bearing the likeness of the fell god upon their chestplates . [ 7 ]
At some point, the incantation " Flame of the Fell God ", which had been kept secret by Chief Guardian Arghanthy , was stolen by a thief named Adan . [ 8 ] Several Fire Monks travelled to Liurnia of the Lakes to seek him out [ 9 ] , erecting camps in the lands on either side of the lake while they searched.
A Flame Monk named Amon fled his duty to watch over the Giants' Flame out of cowardice, instead swearing fealty to the god-slaying black flame . [ 10 ] He was followed by others, enthralled by the black flame [ 11 ] , who became known as Blackflame Monks .
A Fire Monk camp in Liurnia of the Lakes.

area: Limgrave
chapter: 1
name: Rune Bears
Runebear is a Field Boss in Elden Ring . It's a massive beast with a runic pattern on its chest found deep in the Earthbore Cave . This is an optional boss, as players don't need to defeat it in order to advance.
Ralva the Great Red Bear and Rugalea the Great Red Bear are other variants of this boss. Lesser Runebear is the normal enemy form.
Found in Earthbore Cave [ Map Link ]
This is an optional boss
Closest Site of Grace: Earthbore Cave
Multiplayer is allowed for this boss
You can summon Spirit Ashes for this boss
Is vulnerable to a critical hit after being stance broken
Damage: Standard , Slash
Unaffected by Beast-Repellent Torch
The first time you fight this boss, it will be asleep until you attack it. After that, it will begin each fight awake and aggressive.
Drops 2,600, Spelldrake Talisman
The negation numbers are the % of your damage that gets blocked. For example, if a negation is 60, 40% of that damage by that type will go through and 60% will be negated. Bigger number = less damage. A negation of 100 means no damage goes through, and a negation of -100 mean the enemy takes 2x damage from that source. 0 means damage goes pretty much as is.
Poison : 313 / 411 / 701 / 1158
Scarlet Rot : 313 / 411 / 701 / 1158
Hemorrhage : 512 / 802 / 1259
Frostbite : 512 / 802 / 1259
Sleep : 170 / 198 / 240 / 338
The resistance numbers are the buildup amount to trigger it. For example, if a resistance is 100 you must deal 100 points of the given buildup to trigger it. Note that these go down over time, and increase each time the effect procs. The values after the "/"s indicate the increased resistances after each successive proc.
The Best Tips for Runebear:
Use the Lone Wolf Ashes
If you see the Runebear winding up for his grab, hug his left leg and roll with it.
Stay close to the Runebear and roll into its attacks
Keep to the Belly: Try to stay underneath the Runebear. Dodge through its attacks and attack back as hard as you can, dodging forward whenever it swings or rises on its hind legs. Most of its attacks will pass over you, giving you plenty of time to deal damage. Blocking is risky since its attacks do massive Stamina damage.
Break its Stance: Although the Runebear has relatively high Stance , once it breaks it'll be knocked out for long enough to get in a few attacks and a critical hit . This may make it worthwhile to use charged heavy attacks, jump attacks, or other means of dealing lots of stance damage.
Since the Runebear is safest up close, your best bet as a spellcaster is to use short-range spells and follow the same strategy as melee players. Bow users who are unwilling to switch to melee will have quite a challenge. Use a Shortbow for its attack speed and fire arrows at point-blank range.
A bug may occur when the Runebear grabs the player. If they manage to escape by mashing, the boss may fall through the floor and instantly die.
Runebears are enemies and an optional boss in ELDEN RING (2022) .
Giant bears found throughout the Lands Between . They are far larger than other Bears , and display strange markings on their chests.

---

area: Limgrave
chapter: 1
name: Walking Mausoleums
Wandering Mausoleums are special Locations in Elden Ring . Mausoleums appear as walking buildings with four legs and are found throughout the Lands Between, often with their signature bells attached. Players must attack the skull-like deposits on the structure while avoiding damage to get the mausoleum to become accessible. These can appear on either the legs or along the base of the building, the latter of which necessitates jumping on top of it.
Hit the skull-like deposits to make the mausoleum collapse. These skulls can be either on its feet, or around the mausoleum on top.
Around Mausoleums are spectral knights roaming the arena. After bringing it down, they disappear.
Mausoleum can attack by either stomping or performing a slam attack (Non-Bell variant). Their stomp is a near guaranteed death, for invaders/enemies included. The Snowfield Mausoleum fires exploding magic projectiles in an arc around it, dealing heavy Magic damage. It's recommended to hit the Grace at the Apostate Derelict to respawn in case of death.
Place your Boss Remembrance at the altar to Duplicate it. (Note: You do not have to have the Remembrance with you when you do this. If you previously acquired and used it, you can still receive a duplicate at a later time in your playthrough). Only one use per Mausoleum. Pick wisely!
It should be noted that you cannot regain a Remembrance Weapon that you have already obtained (in the same playthrough at least).
Mausoleums without a bell seem to only be able to duplicate Remembrances of bosses that aren't children of Radagon and/or Marika. ( via community testing: Regal Ancestor Spirit , Astel Naturalborn of the Void , Lichdragon Fortissax , Fire Giant , Maliketh, the Black Blade , Dragonlord Placidusax , Hoarah Loux, Warrior and Elden Beast are the only bosses with Remembrances that can be duplicated anywhere . Demigods' Remembrances, like Morgott 's and Malenia 's, will work with bell variant Mausoleums only .)
The Castle Sol and Consecrated Snowfield Mausoleums appear to be bugged for some people where using one of them renders the other unusable but this seems to not apply to everyone.
Players will hear mausoleums as they emit a distinctly loud bell sound as they walk about. They usually have a small roaming area, so they are easy to find. When you first want to access a wandering mausoleum, you must either attack the deposits on its feet or use the environment to climb up, jump onto the wandering mausoleum and destroy the deposits around the structure itself.  This can take considerable time depending on the location.
Once the mausoleum is static, you can enter it at any time to perform a Remembrance Duplication : This is only available once per mausoleum, so pick wisely! Performing this rite will enable you to obtain the multiple Remembrance Weapons (Boss Weapons) and magic that they grant. Boss Armor is not gated behind their remembrances, but you must have defeated them to purchase from Enia at the Roundtable Hold .
There are a total of 7 Wandering Mausoleums in Elden Ring. Monuments with bells will duplicate any boss remembrance. Monuments without bells will only duplicate the remembrance of a non-shard bearer boss. Each reward can only be received once per playthrough.
Weeping Peninsula, Bell : In the western area, east of Isolated Merchant's Shack . [ Map Link ] During the "late night" period of the day/night cycle, the Mausoleum stops moving for approximately seven minutes of real time. It will stop wandering wherever it is when this time is reached, but quitting out and reloading will leave it standing still at its spawn position, closest to the Isolated Merchant's Shack.
Liurnia of the Lakes, Bell : northeast of Raya Lucaria Academy , in the waters in front of Raya Lucaria Crystal Tunnel Grace [ Map Link ]. To access this Wandering Mausoleum you must travel west of the tunnel entrance. Then you need to use the spirit spring to jump onto the Mausoleum when it walks close enough to the cliff wall. You can experiment with the spirit spring jump and also double jump with Torrent after using the spring and take no fall damage. You can also jump from the tombstones on the northern cliff, but you risk dying if you miss. Once on top of the Mausoleum, knock off enough skull piles to subdue it. Like the Weeping Peninsula Mausoleum, it stops wandering during "late night" for seven to eight minutes. Alternatively, hitting the legs will stop the mausoleum from moving, then you can snipe enough skulls to get it to kneel using a bow. The various rocks in the area can be used to get the right angle, the skulls are all on and around the grassy area level.
Liurnia of the Lakes, No Bell: North of the Ruined Labyrinth Grace or, due south of the Mausoleum Compound Grace in Eastern Liurnia, north of the Church of Vows. It stops wandering for about seven minutes during "late night".
Liurnia of the Lakes, No Bell : due north of the Mausoleum Compound Grace near Uld Palace Ruins, north of the Church of Vows [ Map Link ]. It stops wandering at night, in sync with #3.
Mountaintops of the Giants, Bell : Just outside Castle Sol in the northern area. It stops wandering during "late night" for seven to eight minutes. [ Map Link ]
Consecrated Snowfield, Bell : northwest of Ordina , next to the Apostate Derelict Grace. Warning: This one fires magical artillery into the air, bombarding the surroundings until it is subdued. It does not stop moving at night, but it will stop attacking when you're within the walls of the Apostate Derelict church, and won't start again immediately when you step outside. [ Map Link ]
Deeproot Depths, Bell : North of the The Nameless Eternal City Grace. Can be jumped upon by climbing on the roots in the area (be careful of the many Basilisks ), then you must destroy skulls on the top of the Mausoleum instead of the feet. It will stop wandering for exactly seven minutes during the "late night" period of the day/night cycle. [ Map Link ]
Additionally, three Remembrance Duplication Coffins were added in the Shadow of the Erdtree expansion which serve the same purpose.

*The two mausoleums without bells at the Mausoleum Compound site of grace can only duplicate the starred (*) entries. Every other mausoleum can duplicate all remembrances.
Note that if you don't find the white skulls on its feet, you will need to find a way to get to the top level of the structure. There should be elements in the environment around the area that can help you. Areas like cliffs or Spiritsprings nearby can assist with climbing the structure. After reaching the top, the skulls should appear much like those found its feet in other mausoleums. Clear them the same way to be able to enter and use the Wandering Mausoleum.
Wandering mausoleums can be put to sleep by passing time until the morning at a site of grace, which will help to deal with them more easily. They will sleep around 2 minutes and 15 seconds.
An assassin's dagger, misshapen and stained in crimson. Critical hits restore HP.
This charm is modelled after the darkly gleaming blades used in the Night of Black Knives. Those which gave the demigods their first taste of death.
Scale armor used by the Black Knife Assassins, forged to make no sound.
Traces of power yet remain in its concealing veil, which muffles the sound of footsteps.
The assassins that carried out the deeds of the Night of the Black Knives were all women, and rumored to be Numen who had close ties with Marika herself.
Metal greatshield painted with a sun in eclipse. Carried by the headless mausoleum knights.
The eclipsed sun, drained of color, is the protective star of soulless demigods. It aids the mausoleum knights by keeping Destined Death at bay.
Armor worn by headless soldiers who endlessly guard the Wandering Mausoleum.
The surcoat depicts the mausoleum bell, which rings in constant mourning for the soulless demigods.
Armor worn by headless knights who endlessly guard the Wandering Mausoleum.
The wing-shaped ornaments on its back evoke the Deathbird. A self-inflicted curse that ties the spirits of these loyal knights to the land, having willingly beheaded themselves so that they may serve their masters in death.
Legendary ashen remains. Use to summon the spirit of Lhutel the Headless.
Spirit of a headless knight who leads the mausoleum soldiers. Wields a lance enrobed in Death and hurls spectral lances at foes.
Lhutel sacrificed her life so that in Death she could continue to protect a soulless demigod until their revival, earning her the hero's honor of Erdtree Burial.
Wandering Mausoleums are large, mobile structures in ELDEN RING (2022) which serve as means to duplicate Remembrances .
The Wandering Mausoleums are the resting places of soulless demigods who are Marika's unwanted children. [ 1 ] [ 2 ] [ 3 ] They take the form of large buildings mounted atop four legs, which wander around set areas throughout the Lands Between . Some Mausoleums have massive bells hanging from the undersides of their structures which can be heard from afar, ringing to constantly mourn its soulless demigods. [ 4 ] Most have skull-like formations in their feet which disappear and release a small amount of ghostflame when hit.
They are often guarded by Mausoleum Knights and Mausoleum Soldiers , who beheaded themselves in order to follow their masters into death, [ 5 ] a self-inflicted curse that ties their spirits to the land. [ 6 ] Their armor depicts the mausoleum bell, [ 7 ] and the knights don wing-shaped ornamentations that evoke the Deathbirds . [ 8 ]
The shields of the Mausoleum Knights is emblazoned with the eclipsed sun, which is a symbol of the Mausoleums. [ 9 ] The eclipse is the protective star of the soulless demigods and aids the Mausoleum Knights in keeping Destined Death at bay. [ 10 ]
To use mausoleums and do the process of Remembrance duplication, the player needs to enter a Wandering Mausoleum and interact with the headless corpse on the altar inside. Duplication can only be performed once per mausoleum. Remembrances belonging to Shardbearers may only be duplicated at Wandering Mausoleums with bells, while all other Remembrances can be duplicated at any Wandering Mausoleum (as shown on the table below). Remembrances can be duplicated even after they have already been used.
Typically, access to Wandering Mausoleums is granted by hitting the white skull-shaped forms found on the structure's feet, causing the Mausoleum to lower itself to a height where the player can climb onto them. In most cases, Mausoleum Knights , Mausoleum Soldiers , and Mausoleum Footsoldiers will spawn near the Wandering Mausoleums, serving as an additional obstacle to the player's access to the structures.
Mausoleum at Castle Sol
Loading Screen with the Mausoleum in the Weeping Peninsula.
Mausoleum Knights patrolling
The architecture of the mausoleums is strikingly similar to the architecture used by the Eternal Cities. The furniture inside the mausoleums is also seen in the Eternal Cities.
The furniture inside the mausoleums is also seen in the Eternal Cities.
Localisation Notes: Rather than "unwanted child", the soulless demigod(s) of the mausoleum is referred to as Queen Marika's "ugly bastard" or "ugly spawn." (醜い落とし子, Minikui Otoshigo.)
Rather than "unwanted child", the soulless demigod(s) of the mausoleum is referred to as Queen Marika's "ugly bastard" or "ugly spawn." (醜い落とし子, Minikui Otoshigo.)

area: Limgrave
chapter: 1
name: Finger Maidens
Have you heard of the finger maidens? They serve the Two Fingers, offering guidance, and aid, to the Tarnished.
The Finger Maidens are a faction in ELDEN RING (2022) .
3 List of Finger Maidens
The finger maidens are said to serve the Two Fingers , offering guidance and aid to the Tarnished .
The maidens live to serve a chosen Tarnished, sharing their guidance and the wisdom of the Two Fingers.
Long ago, it was promised that the guidance of grace would ensure that the pair be brought together. [ 1 ] Nonetheless, some never saw such guidance. [ 2 ]
They can turn rune fragments into strength. [ 3 ] However, not much else is known about them.
Hyetta seeks to become a Finger Maiden, but unknowingly follows Three Fingers instead.
Irina is never identified as a Finger Maiden, but can be killed in order to advance White-Faced Varré 's quest line.
Melina is not technically a Finger Maiden, but will act as such for the Tarnished to aid them on their journey.
Therolina never met her Tarnished to guide, and was at some point captured by Seluvis and added to the collection of puppets in his secret chambers. Her puppeted form is present for the Radahn Festival at Redmane Castle and can be summoned to assist in fighting General Radahn .
An unnamed Finger Maiden is found dead in the Chapel of Anticipation , holding the Tarnish ed's Wizened Finger . Her blood can be used to soak Lord of Blood's Favor for Varré.
Another unnamed Finger Maiden (who may have guided Roundtable Knight Vyke before he turned coat) is found dead in the Church of Inhibition , holding the Finger Maiden Fillet , Robe , and Shoes . Her blood can be used to soak Lord of Blood's Favor.

---

area: Limgrave
chapter: 1
name: Melina
Melina is an NPC in Elden Ring who acts as a guide to the player throughout the game's narrative. She is a mysterious young lady seen in an opening cutscene with Torrent, the Spectral Steed , and first met at the beginning of the Tarnished's journey . Melina wears a black robe and approaches players while they are resting at different Sites of Grace . She offers guidance throughout the game, granting the ability to turn runes to strength, and teleporting you to certain key areas. She also later becomes available as an NPC Summon . Furthermore, the Shadow of the Erdtree (SOTE) expansion strongly implies that she is the younger sister of Messmer the Impaler, revealing that much like Messmer, she too bore a vision of fire and shares a deep, inherent connection to Queen Marika.
See Melina's Dialogue
See Echoes of Queen Marika
I can play the role of maiden. Turning runes into strength. To aid you in your search for the Elden Ring. You need only take me with you. To the foot of the Erdtree.
Melina will reveal herself at different Sites of Grace along the game's storyline. The player is also able to converse with her via a "Talk to Melina" option when sitting at other Sites of Grace even when she does not automatically appear.
Melina is first met after resting at Gatefront Site of Grace, by Gatefront Ruins or another overland Limgrave Site of Grace, after activating a certain number of them. Other potential Sites of Grace: Church of Elleh , Seaside Ruins , and Agheel Lake South .
When activating a Site of Grace on the overland that is located outside of Limgrave and Weeping Peninsula , resting upon one will trigger dialogue after which Melina will transport the player to the Roundtable Hold . The common Sites of Grace that trigger this are the Lake-Facing Cliffs in Liurnia of the Lakes , and Sellia Under-Stair or Smoldering Church in Caelid . These locations can be accessed relatively early if the player knows how to reach them. ( Sellia Under-Stair can be reached the earliest, through a transporter trap chest in a basement cellar in Dragon-Burnt Ruins that brings the player to Sellia Crystal Tunnel , from which they can exit to find the Sellia Under-Stair Site of Grace).
NPC Summon : Morgott, the Omen King . Progress in the Melina questline until she leaves. Her summon sign is at the top of the stairs on the right, in front of the fog gate. She wields the Blade of Calling and uses Erdtree/healing incantations .
(Melina does not have a traditional completable " NPC Quest ", since she's so strongly tied with the "Main Quest" of the game, but the following lists the opportunities for interaction)
After resting at a Site of Grace (outside of the Church of Elleh ) on the overland, Melina will manifest herself and reflect on the absence of a guidance during your journey so far, appearing out of the air with a blueish aura around her. Melina proposes an accord: to act as your "maiden", that is, as a guide throughout your journey, for you are "maidenless". In exchange, she requests you take her with you to the Erdtree. She volunteers to "turn your Runes into strength", enabling you to level up your character. She will also bequeath a ring, the Spectral Steed Whistle , allowing you to summon the spectral steed Torrent who has "chosen you".
At the next Site of Grace you rest at before entering Stormveil Castle , selecting the "Talk to Melina" option will trigger a conversation about the Sites of Grace. During this, Melina conveys the golden auras at the different Sites of Grace are in fact the grace of the Erdtree, and by following them, the grace will guide you through your burden. She informs you that a Shardbearer resides in Stormveil Castle, and that if the rays signal the castle, the Elden Ring is beckoning you.
At the next Site of Grace you rest at before entering Stormveil Castle , selecting the "Talk to Melina" option will trigger a conversation with Melina about her purpose, where she describes her search for her purpose and also apologizes for acting as a Finger Maiden while being unable to offer guidance, as she is "no maiden" and without purpose.
At the Third Church of Marika , when resting at the grace and selecting the "Talk to Melina" option, Melina will appear and declare that spoken echoes of Queen Marika the Eternal are present, and if you wish she will convey them to you. Select the "I'm interested" dialogue option and she will continue to describe the echoes.
At the Church of Pilgrimage , in the north of the Weeping Peninsula , when resting at the grace and selecting the "Talk to Melina" option, Melina will again appear and give the option to elucidate on the echoes.
Upon reaching the East Capital Rampart Site of Grace (or any grace in Leyndell), Melina will appear and say that she will be leaving, but that she will let you keep Torrent and the ability to turn runes into power. She reasserts her confidence that you will become the Elden Lord.
Melina may be summoned for the fight against Morgott, the Omen King via a sign directly outside the boss arena.
After defeating Morgott , trying and failing to enter the Erdtree and resting at the Elden Throne Site of Grace, Melina appears. She offers a new accord: to bring her "to the flame of ruin , far above the clouds, upon snowy mountaintops of the giants", so she can set the Erdtree aflame, and help you become Elden Lord.
Melina will then have additional dialogue when resting at certain Sites of Grace, the Godrick the Grafted Site of Grace for example. She will remind the player of the new goal in the land of the giants. She can then be spoken to a second time, and she will say that although her purpose was giving to her by her mother, she is now acting on her own volition and has "set [her] heart upon the world that [she] would have. Regardless of [her] mother's designs."
Melina must be talked to in the Forge of the Giants Grace, and her quest will be fulfilled. If the player has inherited the Frenzied Flame despite Melina pleading them not to do it, Melina will not appear in this grace. Instead, she will appear after the ending of the game if the player continues with the Frenzied Flame path, and will threaten the Lord of Frenzied Flame with Destined Death.
If the player has inherited the Frenzied Flame despite Melina pleading them not to do it, Melina will not appear in this grace. Instead, she will appear after the ending of the game if the player continues with the Frenzied Flame path, and will threaten the Lord of Frenzied Flame with Destined Death.
Don't worry Torrent, fortune is on his / her side. We found him / her here, after all. One of his / her kind is sure to seek the Elden Ring. ...Even if it does violate the Golden Order...

This tiny golden aura is the grace of the Erdtree. This light once shone in the eyes of your Tarnished brethren. But now it is all that guides you. Or so I hear. You can see them, can't you? The rays of grace, that guide you through your burden.
Upon the cliff, in Castle Stormveil, is a shardbearer. A demigod who inherited a fragment of the shattered Elden Ring. If the rays of grace signal the castle, then the Elden Ring beckons you. As an ally by pact,...I pray that you are fit... To face the challenge presented by the Ring.
Me? I'm searching. For my purpose, given to me by my mother inside the Erdtree, long ago. For the reason that I yet live, burned and bodiless.

Forgive me. I've been...testing you. To see whether or not grace truly does guide you. And...whether you are fit to face the challenge that entails. It seems my worries were unfounded. Torrent had your measure from the very start. Whereas I merely pretended.
There is but one other thing I can do to offer you guidance. I can take you to the Roundtable Hold... Gathering place of Tarnished champions, guided by Grace... [I'll go, too] Very well. Let my hand rest upon you, for but a moment.
Your seamster, Boc... He is always eager to see your return. Please, will you talk to him, when you can? I'm sure he would be much contented.

The Erdtree...is close. Only a little further till the foot of the Erdtree, and the accord is fulfilled.
It takes me back. I was born at the foot of the Erdtree. Where mother gave me my purpose.

Does being born of a mother... Mean one behaves in such a manner?
It is possible for her to appear once you reach the Capital Rampart site of grace .
My utmost thanks. For bringing me to the base of the Erdtree. Here, I can govern my own movement. And thus, the accord is fulfilled. I shall depart to ascertain the purpose I was given. Farewell.
I shall leave Torrent, and the power to turn runes into strength, here with you. I wish you luck, in realising your ambition. You have fought long and hard. I have no doubt you will become Elden Lord. May you take the throne.
After discovering the Impenetrable Thorns of the Erdtree, she appears when resting at the first site of grace afterward; typically the " Elden Throne " site of grace 。
Hello again, old friend. Allow me a moment to converse with you.
You were unable to enter the Erdtree, no? Prevented by the mantle of barbs. The thorns are impenetrable. A husk of the Erdtree's being; that spurns all that exists without. The only way to stand before the Elden Ring... and become the Elden Lord... is to pass the thorns.
My purpose serves to aid in that very act. So I'd like you to undertake a new journey, with me. To the flame of ruin, far above the clouds, upon the snowy mountaintops of the giants. Then I can set the Erdtree aflame. And guide you. Down the path to becoming Elden Lord. [ Rold Medallion ]

However ruined this world has become, however mired in torment and despair, life endures. Births continue. There is beauty in that, is there not?

" Lord of Frenzied Flame " ending cutscene
Lord of Frenzied Flame... I will seek you, as far as you may travel... To deliver you what is yours. Destined Death.
First time encountering an Echo :
Spoken echoes linger here. Words of Queen Marika, who vanished long ago.
If you wish, I will share them with you.
Very well. In Marika's own words. ... Well? Perhaps that might serve you in lieu of a maiden's guidance.
All subsequent encounters with Echoes :
Spoken echoes of Queen Marika linger here, as well.
Shall I share them with you?
In Marika's own words.
First Church of Marika
Hark, brave warriors. Hark, my lord Godfrey. We commend your deeds. Guidance has delivered ye through ordeal to the place ye stand.
Put the giants to the sword and confine the flame atop the mount. Let a new epoch begin. An epoch glistening with life.
Brandish the Elden Ring, for the Age of the Erdtree
Grand Lift of Dectus
The Erdtree governs all. The choice is thine.
Become one with the Order. Or divest thyself of it. To wallow at the fringes; a powerless upstart.
Minor Erdtree Church
I declare mine intent, to search the depths of the Golden Order. Through understanding of the proper way, our faith, our grace, is increased. Those blissful early days of blind belief are long past. My comrades; why must ye falter?
Third Church of Marika
My Lord, and thy warriors. I divest each of thee of thy grace.
With thine eyes dimmed, ye will be driven from the Lands Between. Ye will wage war in a land afar, where ye will live, and die.
Outer Wall Battleground, Site of Grace
Hear me, Demigods. My children beloved. Make of thyselves that which ye desire. Be it a Lord. Be it a God.
But should ye fail to become aught at all, ye will be forsaken. Amounting only to sacrifices...
Church of the Pilgrimage
Then, after thy death, I will give back what I once claimed. Return to the Lands Between, wage war, and brandish the Elden Ring. Grow strong in the face of death. Warriors of my lord. Lord Godfrey.

O Radagon, leal hound of the Golden Order. Thou'rt yet to become me. Thou'rt yet to become a god. Let us be shattered, both. Mine other self.
Melina's internal name in the game files is "Marica Of Daughter". Her dialogue in the base game heavily hints at Queen Marika being her mother. This is confirmed in the item description for Messmer's Kindling in the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC, which also reveals that Melina is the younger sister of Messmer. Finger Reader Enia also mentions that "for the flame to burn the Erdtree, a sacrifice is needed. Of one who envisions the flame" . This would make Melina either a demigod, or otherwise an Empyrean if she was born from the union of Radagon and Marika.
Messmer's Kindling cannot be used in place of her as kindling at the Forge of the Giants.
A delicate goldwork ring. Can be used as a finger whistle.
Sound the whistle to summon and ride Torrent, the spectral steed. (Dismounts steed when used while on horseback.)
Upon his death, the spectral steed can be summoned again, but doing so drains the Flask of Crimson Tears.
Conjoined split medallion depicting the Flame Peak.
Brandishing the medallion activates the Grand Lift of Rold, connecting Leyndell to the Mountaintops of the Giants.
The forge of the flame of ruin is said to be found upon their peaks, and it is here Melina wishes to travel in resuming your journey together.
Dagger given to one who set out on a journey to fulfill her duty long ago. The power of its former owner, the kindling maiden, is still apparent.
The one who walks alongside flame, shall one day meet the road of Destined Death.
Melina is a mysterious, spectral girl who is the deuteragonist of ELDEN RING (2022) . She offers an alliance with the Tarnished to help them on their journey.
1 Overview 1.1 Background 1.2 Game Events
2 Character Information 2.1 Summon sign 2.2 Equipment 2.3 Quest items
3 Questline Progression
Melina was born at the foot of the Erdtree [ 1 ] and describes her mother as within the Erdtree. [ 2 ] Although it is never stated, it can be inferred that her mother is Queen Marika the Eternal . During Boc's questline she asks if "being born of a mother" means acting in certain ways, [ 3 ] which makes the specifics of her origins unclear.
At some point, Melina's body was burned, which left her bodiless and as a roaming spirit [ 4 ] with no memory of her purpose given to her by her mother. [ 5 ] And so, she looked for a way to go to the foot of the Erdtree to ascertain her given purpose, and to be able to govern her movement, seemingly lost as a spirit, [ 6 ] meeting and travelling with Torrent at some time.
Melina is accompanied by the spectral steed Torrent when they both spot an adrift Tarnished whom she believes is fortunate. [ 7 ] Some time later, she decides to approach and offer an accord to the maidenless Tarnished: she could play the role of the missing Finger Maiden in return for a ride to the foot of the Erdtree. [ 8 ] The Tarnished is forced to accept if they desire the strength of runes, and, if they accept the accord, Melina entrusts them with the Spectral Steed Whistle and, therefore, Torrent.
When Melina starts travelling with the Tarnished, she advises to follow the guidance of grace and seek the demigod residing within Stormveil Castle . [ 9 ] Once the Tarnished has felled the demigod, Melina confesses that she was testing the Tarnished to see if they truly possessed the guidance of grace and if they were fit for the challenges to come. Satisfied with her new companion, Melina offers to take them to Roundtable Hold , a gathering place for Tarnished champions. [ 10 ] Throughout their journey, Melina also provides specks of guidance at certain sites of grace and, at churches dedicated to Queen Marika , she offers to reveal words spoken by Marika herself in the distant past. [ 11 ]
Upon arriving at their destination, the Royal Capital at the foot of the Erdtree , Melina thanks the Tarnished for escorting her and leaves to ascertain her purpose, claiming that she can govern her movement more freely there. She entrusts the power of runes and Torrent to the Tarnished. [ 12 ] She will also offer her aid should the Tarnished challenge Morgott, the Omen King , ruler of Leyndell and guardian of the Erdtree.
After defeating Morgott, the Tarnished finds the path into the Erdtree barred by thorns refusing entrance to all. Melina, having ascertained her purpose and seeing the Tarnished stuck, rejoins the Tarnished to say that she can burn the Erdtree to gain entrance inside, provided that she can get ahold of the Flame of Ruin. And hence, she asks to go on a new journey, this time to the flame of ruin, far above the clouds, upon the snowy Mountaintops of the Giants . [ 13 ] and tells them she will take care of the "kindling" required to set the tree alight. [ 14 ]
Defeating Morgott also opens up the path to the Three Fingers . If the Tarnished rests at the nearest grace from their entombment, Melina will warn against meeting them and insist against inheriting the Frenzied Flame, for it would end all lives and births, which she cherishes. [ 15 ] If the player ignores her warnings, or just inherits the Frenzied Flame without speaking with her, she will say that The Tarnished is no longer fit, ending her accord, and forever leaving their side but threatening to kill them should they become Lord of Chaos . [ 16 ] If the Tarnished instead heeds her warnings, Melina and the protagonist will continue their Journey for the Flame of Ruin.
When making their way to the Forge of the Giants, Melina clarifies that she is now acting of her own volition, regardless of the purpose that her mother gave her. [ 17 ] After defeating the guardian of the flame , Melina puts her plan into action. She takes the Tarnished's hand, narcotizing them by doing so, and proceeds to sacrifice herself to channel the flame of ruin, setting the Erdtree aflame. [ 18 ] The Tarnished, maidenless once more, wakes up at Crumbling Farum Azula , fulfilling the saying of the Blade of Calling : The one who walks alongside flame, Shall one day meet the road of Destined Death .
Melina may only be encountered when resting at Sites of Grace .
Melina's questline runs parallel to the main storyline and thus must be completed to finish the game.
Limgrave Activate two different Sites of Grace in the open world and then sit at one of the following Graces: Agheel Lake North , Agheel Lake South , Bridge of Sacrifice , Church of Elleh , Gatefront Ruins , Seaside Ruins , Stormhill Shack , or Third Church of Marika . You will trigger the first interaction with Melina. She will offer you an accord, allowing you to continue her quest. Agheel Lake North and Gatefront Ruins will always summon Melina, even if two other Sites of Grace haven't been activated. If you refuse her accord, you cannot enter Leyndell, Royal Capital, even with two Great Runes. If you refuse, you may always change your mind by selecting "Talk to Melina" at any Site of Grace. If you accept, you will obtain the Spectral Seed Whistle, allowing you to summon Torrent. (Optional) After accepting her accord, Melina may appear when you rest at Sites of Grace to offer the dialogue options "The Rays of Grace" and "Melina's Goal". These options will no longer be available once you progress to the next step.
Activate two different Sites of Grace in the open world and then sit at one of the following Graces: Agheel Lake North , Agheel

area: Mountaintops of the Giants
chapter: 21
name: Hoslow Family
Juno Hoslow, Knight of Blood is a Humanoid Enemy in Elden Ring . Juno Hoslow is a Hostile NPC that you can invade as part of the final contract of the Volcano Manor questline. A Tarnished knight equipped with the signature whips and silver armor of his house, he is also the older brother of Diallos . Other Invadable NPCs can be found here .
See Juno Hoslow, Knight of Blood Lore
Juno Hoslow had a younger brother who was all talk and no trousers. His inability to commit to action was such that Juno inherited the Hoslow legacy without resistance, granting him the freedom to shower his little brother with adoration.
Where to Find Juno Hoslow, Knight of Blood :
Mountaintops of the Giants : East of Shack of the Lofty . Touch the red Summon Sign on the ground to invade his world. Only available after progressing the Volcano Manor questline. [ Elden Ring Map here ]
Furlcalling Finger Remedy
Always performs the Hoslow's Oath gesture, giving it to the player once completed.
Dual wields Hoslow's Petal Whips, dealing high Strike Damage and inflicting Blood Loss build-up. He also uses Bloodhound's Step to weave in and out of attacks.
Assuming correct timing, all of Juno's right hand whip attacks - including his double whip attack - can be dodged by rolling towards him. Ensure the Tarnished remains just about striking distance away from Juno to bait out an attack.
If rolling towards Juno and immediately attacking, he will either take the hit or use Bloodhound's Step to dodge away. It is best to simply commit to one attack lest he immediately counters with a whip attack of his own.
If Juno uses Bloodhound's Step to dodge away from the follow up attack, he himself will either follow up with another attack or do nothing. However, Juno's idle is often short enough for him to use another attack. Thus, it is simply best to bait out another attack while he is idle.
While it is possible to dodge Juno's left hand whip attack, this is almost impossible as the whip hitbox is confusingly large. It is simply best to back away from Juno if he uses his left hand whip attacks.
Like any human encounter, status effects are very effective.
It is possible to use Inescapable Frenzy to grab him while is busy performing his gesture. (confirmed as of February 3, 2024)
Replica of a twin-tailed silver helm with flowery adornments. Only, without the twin tails.
Diallos Hoslow had an older brother who was a stern, self-possessed man of a few words. His achievements made him seem out of reach.
And so the younger aspired to be like the older. Yearning for the day that he would tell the tale of House Hoslow, in blood. Knowing full well that it would break his brother's heart .
Garish silver armor decorated with red embellishments. Passed down through the Hoslow family. When Juno Hoslow received an invitation to the Volcano Manor, he discreetly refused. "I have already walked many a road drenched in blood, yet never would I consider myself a champion."
A twin-tailed silver helm decorated with flowery adornments. Symbol of the head of the revered House of Hoslow.
Juno Hoslow had a younger brother who was all talk and no trousers.
His inability to commit to action was such that Juno inherited the Hoslow legacy without resistance, granting him the freedom to shower his little brother with adoration .
Juno Hoslow, Knight of Blood is a hostile NPC in ELDEN RING (2022) .
2 Character Information 2.1 Equipment 2.2 Quest Items
3 Questline Progression
Juno Hoslow is Diallos ' older brother [ 1 ] and the head of their illustrious house . [ 2 ]
A successful, stern and self-possessed man of a few words [ 1 ] , Juno inherited the legacy of the Hoslow family to protect his inept brother, whom he loved dearly. [ 2 ]
Despite dreching himself in blood time and time again, he refused the invitation to the Volcano Manor. [ 3 ] Later, he became their target.
His sign can be found in the Mountaintops of the Giants , outside the Shack of the Lofty .
Mt. Gelmir ( Volcano Manor ) After joining the Volcano Manor and eliminating Old Knight Istvan and Rileigh the Idle under Tanith 's request, retrieve the Red Letter to unlock Juno Hoslow's invasion sign in the Mountaintops of the Giants. With Rileigh dead, you can also talk to Recusant Bernahl to receive the Letter to Bernahl , offering you to join him in his hunt against Vargram the Raging Wolf and Errant Sorcerer Wilhelm in Leyndell, Royal Capital .

With the Red Letter in inventory, even If Rykard, Lord of Blasphemy is defeated prior to the invasion, abruptly concluding Tanith's questline, not only the invasion sign will still be available, but the reward will be relocated in the spot where the Red Letter was retrieved.

---

area: Mt. Gelmir
chapter: 14
name: Volcano Manor Questline
Volcano Manor is a legacy dungeon located on Mt. Gelmir .
The Volcano Manor is home to the recusants of Praetor Rykard , fierce warriors who wage war against the Erdtree and the Roundtable . The recusants are led by Rykard's consort, Lady Tanith . Powerful Tarnished are extended invitations to join the Volcano Manor and are given contracts to hunt other Tarnished in service of the Roundtable. Tarnished who prove themselves are offered an audience with Praetor Rykard himself, which will inevitably end with the serpentine demigod devouring them, making them forever a part of his "family".
The Volcano Manor is besieged by the forces of the Royal Capital .
The Volcano Manor is one of the game's most complex locations. It can be reached in multiple ways and you can progress through from different directions.
The fastest, but most gimmicky way to reach it is by letting the Abductor Virgin at the bottom of the Raya Lucaria Academy grapple you to death. You will still drop your runes, but be respawned right within the Volcano Manor area. From here there are two paths that are each a point of no return. One leading to the rest of the manor, the other brings you to the Abductor Virgin duo bossfight and back to the Altus Plateau . For the Abductor Virgin boss, search for the cave with multiple drop-down platforms. To progress deeper into the manor, jump down the lava waterfall. If you die here before reaching a grace, you will be respawned where the Abductor Virgin dropped you within Volcano Manor. From here you can explore the area, defeat the Godskin Noble and either make it back to the manor entrance with Lady Tanith and the other npcs, or skip their quests and head straight to the gateway portal leading to Praetor Rykard .
The regular paths to enter the manor are either on foot/horseback across Mt. Gelmir , or to be teleported right to the Volcano Manor entrance grace by Rya once reaching the Altus Plateau . You won't be able to reach the bosses or explore the rest of the area from here unless you accept Lady Tanith's offer to get the Drawing-Room Key . If you join the manor, a list of NPCs become available there: Bernahl , Patches , Rya , Diallos Hoslow . To get all the content out of the manor, you have to wait with fighting Rykard until reaching the Mountaintops of the Giants , so that you can do all of the following NPC invasions for the manor: Old Knight Istvan , Rileigh the Idle, Great Horned Tragoth , Vargram the Raging Wolf + Errant Sorcerer Wilhelm, Juno Hoslow, Knight of Blood . After defeating Juno Hoslow, Tanith offers to send you to Rykard, where you can then start the boss fight. Remember to complete Rya 's quest before defeating Juno Hoslow, Knight of Blood , otherwise you'll be locked out of Tanith 's dialogue regarding Rya.

area: Limgrave
chapter: 1
name: Deathbirds
Death Rite Bird is a Field Boss in Elden Ring . These skeletal bird-like creatures are found throughout the lands between, usually at night. These are optional bosses as players are not required to defeat them in order to advance in Elden Ring, but they do provide useful items and Runes upon defeat. Unlike their weaker variants the Deathbirds , they have a full set of wings and wield powerful ghostflame magic.
See Death Rite Bird Lore
In the time when there was no Erdtree, death was burned in ghostflame. Deathbirds were the keepers of that fire.
Death Rite Birds can be found in:
Academy Gate Town [ More Info ↓ ] [ Map Link ]
Caelid [ More Info ↓ ] [ Map Link ]
Mountaintops of the Giants [ More Info ↓ ] [ Map Link ]
Apostate Derelict [ More Info ↓ ] [ Map Link ]
Charo's Hidden Grave [ More Info ↓ ] [ Map Link ]
Is vulnerable to a critical hit after being stance broken
Those Who Live in Death
Damage: Standard , Pierce , Magic
Inflicts: Frostbite , Death Blight
The negation numbers are the % of your damage that gets blocked. For example, if a negation is 60, 40% of that damage by that type will go through and 60% will be negated. Bigger number = less damage. A negation of 100 means no damage goes through, and a negation of -100 mean the enemy takes 2x damage from that source. 0 means damage goes pretty much as is.
The Best Tips for Death Rite Bird:
Holy Water Pots can take advantage of its weakness to Holy damage and the pots' inherent 400% damage bonus against Those Who Live in Death to do massive damage even at low Faith
The Sacred Blade skill is another great way for non- Faith builds to do Holy damage
Use Fallingstar Beast Jaw 's skill, Gravity Bolt , when locked onto the Death Rite Bird's head to quickly break its stance
Blind spots include right under the Death Rite Bird or behind it, but ghostflame can limit even these locations
Be careful when locking onto its head, as it moves around quickly and can easily disorient you. It's a good idea to only lock onto its head when you're actively trying to attack it, and otherwise stay locked on its body
Stay on foot by default, and only get on Torrent briefly to evade specific attacks. A Death Rite Bird can leap a great distance, and the reach on its poker is long enough to clip you even when you're running at full speed on Torrent. The passive damage from its ghostlfame will also knock you off your horse quickly. Even ranged players should try to stay just outside the range of its swings, and keep the flexibility to dodge out of the way when it attacks
Stay close to its hind legs, time your dodges, and get a few swings in after every attack. Don't get greedy and attack more than a few times.
O Holy Fight: Because Death Rite Birds are both Those Who Live in Death and weak to Holy damage, melee builds with high Faith will have a particularly easy time defeating them. The Order's Blade sorcery is easy to get and will give your weapon a tremendous damage boost against this boss.
Many of its abilities can one-shot you if you don't have high HP. Many more deal ghostflame chip damage even if you block, or cause lingering ghostflame that deals damage over time across a wide area. Between this and its ability to close distance rapidly and attack again even as you dodge, it's difficult to find an opportunity to safely attack from a distance. The lingering ghostflame also makes it difficult to stay in the safer areas behind them and near their feet. Play cautiously, focus on survival, and only get in attacks when you're confident you can do so safely.
It's Litany: For Faith -based magic builds, Litany of Proper Death will make short work of this fight. Because Death Right Birds are both Those Who Live in Death and weak to Holy damage, it will do a whopping 1400% extra damage. Just be aware that it will only work when the Death Rite Bird is touching the ground, so time the incantation carefully.
The Ravenmount Assassins worship these creatures, modeling their armor after them.
This is an optional boss
Closest Site of Grace: Gate Town North
Multiplayer is allowed for this boss
You cannot summon Spirit Ashes for this boss
Just south of the Gate Town North Site of Grace. As with most Death Rite Birds, it only appears at night. [ Map Link ]
Drops 7,800, Ancient Death Rancor
Scarlet Rot : 539 / 829 / 1286
The resistance numbers are the buildup amount to trigger it. For example, if a resistance is 100 you must deal 100 points of the given buildup to trigger it. Note that these go down over time, and increase each time the effect procs. The values after the "/"s indicate the increased resistances after each successive proc.
Closest Site of Grace: Southern Aeonia Swamp Bank
Across the path to the southeast of the Southern Aeonia Swamp Bank Site of Grace. As with most Death Rite Birds, it only appears at night. [ Map Link ]
Drops 15,000, Death's Poker
Above the gate on the road to Sellia, there is a pot-throwing Troll. If you bait the Death Rite Bird into the range of the Troll, the pots it throws deal a significant amount of damage
You could also use a bow to shoot it down from above, after you've taken care of the pot throwing troll.
Scarlet Rot : 543 / 833 / 1290
Closest Site of Grace: Castle Sol Main Gate
You can summon Spirit Ashes for this boss
From the Castle Sol Main Gate Site of Grace, head west and take the path up to the plateau. Alternatively, from the Snow Valley Ruins Overlook head west and take the path down . Either way, the Death Rite Bird is on the middle ledge between the lower and upper levels. Unlike other Death Rite Birds, it appears even during the day. [ Map Link ]
Drops 77,000, Death Ritual Spear
Use the terrain to your advantage. There's a valley near the arena. Move between the top and bottom of it to exploit the horizontal limits of its relatively flat hit-boxes. If it's either significantly above or below you, most of the physical components of its attacks will miss, making it much easier to deal with its area-of-effect attacks and get in hits. If you get a good summon out before you engage, take it slow, and quickly move to keep it on a different level from you, this becomes a significantly easier fight
OR you can use the cliff as your environment backup, just bait out the flying sweep move as you do a slight drop down from near the stone astrolabes above the cliff, and the fall damage will most likely kill the bird.
Scarlet Rot : 565 / 855 / 1312
Closest Site of Grace: Apostate Derelict
Found at the head of the frozen river, just southeast of the Apostate Derelict . As with most Death Rite Birds, it only appears at night. [ Map Link ]
Drops 220,000, Explosive Ghostflame
Use the terrain to your advantage. As soon as it spawns, you can ride Torrent up the pathway to the west of the river and stand on the cliffs above the Death Rite Bird, and will be completely out of range of all of its attacks. From here you can use ranged attacks to defeat it easily.
OR you could use the nearby Rotten Duelist as your temporary ally, just bait out his charge move and lure him all the way down to where the bird is, then use Bewitching Branch on him.

You can summon Spirit Ashes for this boss
From the Charo's Hidden Grave Site of Grace, pass through under the stone bridge into a graveyard partly sunken in water, then make your way towards the end and the Death Rite Bird will appear. [ Map Link ]

Death Rite Birds are optional recurring bosses in ELDEN RING (2022) . They are a more powerful version of the deathbirds .
2 Boss fight 2.1 Moveset 2.1.1 Phase 1 2.1.2 Phase 2 2.2 Weaknesses
2.1 Moveset 2.1.1 Phase 1 2.1.2 Phase 2
Death Rite Birds are gigantic decaying birds with incrusted corpses over their body, partially covered in ghostflame and guarded by the spirits of the servants of death inside their wings.
All deathbirds are said to be the offspring of an entity called the twinbird , which is an envoy of an outer god . [ 1 ] Their purpose was to tend the ghostflame [ 2 ] by raking out the ashen remains of the death from their kiln. Because of this, they were called graveyard fire keepers [ 3 ] and used to be widely active before the Erdtree existed, [ 4 ] although regarded as malevolent deities by some. [ 5 ]
Through the ancient act of the rite of Death , priests of old were permitted to come among the deathbirds and become their guardians, and act which serves as an oath sworn to their distant resurrection. [ 6 ] Such priests can be seen inside their wings as spirit beings wielding death ritual spears .
The Death Rite Bird often spawns from a giant ball of Ghostflame up in the sky.
It is possible to lock onto either the boss's head or the spine. It takes extra damage when hit in the head, but due to how much it moves, it can disorienting and result in getting dead-angled when blocking, so it's usually safer to lock into the spine or not at all.
While it is possible to fight this boss on horseback, it is not recommended. The safest place to be in melee range is behind its legs, where neither the weapon swings, nor the beak can hit you.
This boss can be staggered when dealt enough damage, giving you a window to land a visceral attack on its head.
The first phase is very similar to a normal Deathbird fight, with the difference that its melee attacks deal both physical and ghostflame damage, making shields somewhat less effective although blocking is still preferable to receiving the damage directly.
Death Rite Birds also uses Ghostflame Ignition, the unique ash of war of the Death's Poker .
When dropping to 50% HP it gains 3 new attacks:
As they count as Those Who Live in Death they are weak to Holy damage and extremely weak to specific anti-undead weapons. Ash of War: Sacred Blade and Holy Water Pots are useful tools to make short work of these enemies, even if the user doesn't have a lot of Faith .
Picture showing a path from the nearest grace (left) to the Death Rite Bird in Caelid (right)
The birds are made of bodies

↑ Death Ritual Spear

area: Limgrave
chapter: 1
name: Tibia Mariner
Tibia Mariner is a Field Boss in Elden Ring . These hunched skeleton dress in lace and ride a ghostly boat. It steers its vessel and attacks the player with a large horn and the aid of undead Skeletons . They are optional bosses, as players don't need to defeat them in order to advance in Elden Ring .
See Tibia Mariner Lore
Tibia Mariner can be found in:
Summonwater Village [ More Info ] [ Map Link ]
Liurnia of the Lakes [ More Info ] [ Map Link ]
Wyndham Ruins [ More Info ] [ Map Link ]
Mountaintops of the Giants [ More Info ] [ Map Link ]
Charo's Hidden Grave [ More Info ] [ Map Link ]
Immune to critical attacks . Breaking its stance will only stun it briefly.
The negation numbers are the % of your damage that gets blocked. For example, if a negation is 60, 40% of that damage by that type will go through and 60% will be negated. Bigger number = less damage. A negation of 100 means no damage goes through, and a negation of -100 mean the enemy takes 2x damage from that source. 0 means damage goes pretty much as is.
The Best Tips for Tibia Mariner:
Stay on Torrent throughout the battle to more easily follow the Tibia Mariner when it teleports.
Use a spirit ash that can help you distract the Skeletons , like the Lone Wolf Ashes .
Yee Haw: Stay mounted on Torrent , run in for a few hits, then run away again. The Skeletons are slow enough that you won't need to worry about them, and the Tibia Mariner's attacks are slow enough that you probably won't get hit often.
Slow and Steady: If you're fighting on foot, focus on damaging the Tibia Mariner itself and try to avoid getting hit by the Skeletons. Hit the boss a few times and then dodge out of the way when it starts attacking. Keep repeating this, staying to its side or behind it if you can. The Crashing Wave attack will kill Skeletons as well, which can help control the crowd.
Stay on horseback and keep back when attacking. The Tibia Mariner moves slowly and doesn't have any way to punish ranged attacks other than its allies, which move slowly in their own right as well. If they start crowding you, run to the other side of the boss and attack from there.
They always drop Deathroot , which signifies their control over Those Who Live in Death .
They also occasionally summon a Giant Skeleton (Spirit) .
Known as Bonebeckoner Mariner in 1.00 version of the game.

Closest Site of Grace: Snow Valley Ruins Overlook
The Tibia Mariner can be found in a small nook on the cliff to the northwest of the Snow Valley Ruins Overlook Site of Grace, overlooking Castle Sol . [ Map Link ]
Although this Tibia Mariner is found near several Giant Skeletons (Spirit) like those summoned by the one in Altus Plateau, they're more autonomous and stationary. They'll attack without being invoked by the Mariner, but they'll also stay in one place rather than following you. They usually can't reach the nook in which you find the Mariner, so you can fight it without worrying about them.
Once this Tibia Mariner is defeated, the nearby Giant Skeletons (Spirit) will continue to respawn after the area has been reset after a Site of Grace rest or a death. This is because they actually aren't summoned by the Tibia Mariner.

The old grave keepers are boatsmen, and continue to summon the dead even after withering away.
Tibia Mariners are optional bosses in ELDEN RING (2022) .
1 Background 1.1 The Golden Order
1.1 The Golden Order
2 Bosses 2.1 Drops 2.2 Moveset
Mariners are grave keepers who ferry lost souls across a sea in the spirit world . [ 1 ] [ 2 ] [ 3 ] [ 4 ] They navigate their spectral vessels through ghostly waters with alpine horns that, when blown, summon Those Who Live in Death . [ 5 ] Their movement is not restricted to water when they appear in the Lands Between .
The Tibia Mariners were the first of all grave keepers in the Lands Between . [ 6 ] They beckon Those Lost in Death by blowing into their hollow oars. [ 5 ] [ 7 ] They have guided the dead to the Gravesite Plain for an eternity, [ 3 ] unbothered by their bones having long since crumbled to dust. [ 1 ]
The ancient mariners themselves were laid to rest amongst the crimson fields of Charo's Hidden Grave . [ 8 ] Their secrets were inherited by future generations of grave keepers , [ 9 ] who used their skulls as catalysts for summoning wandering spirits . [ 10 ] Their boats, or recreations of them, were prominently displayed in the Shadow Keep 's Church District . The importance of the oarsmen was recognized even amongst the living.
The Tibia Mariners were suppressed when the Rune of Death was removed from the Elden Ring . [ 5 ] In their absence, those without Marika 's Grace who met a glorious end in battle were left to wander. [ 11 ] [ 12 ] The heroes of her Golden Order received Erdtree Burial , [ 13 ] and had no need for the archaic ferrymen. [ 14 ]
When Godwyn the Golden was buried at the base of the Erdtree , he soon transformed into the piscine Prince of Death . [ 15 ] The blight leaked from his body and infected the great tree roots, and manifested itself as Deathroot throughout the Lands Between. [ 16 ] The Tibia Mariners slowly resurfaced, and Those Who Live in Death answered their call. [ 5 ] [ 17 ]
Gurranq the Beast Clergyman charges D, Hunter of the Dead , and the Tarnished to hunt down the Tibia Mariners and reap their Deathroot. [ 18 ] He believes he can restore the sanctity of the Golden Order by absorbing the residual fragments of Destined Death . [ 19 ] [ 20 ] [ 21 ]
While the Tibia Mariners themselves curiously enough are not counted as among Those Who Live in Death , their minions are and usage of specialized anti-undead equipment will make it easier to isolate the mariner.
In terms of combat ability, these enemies are quite weak on their own, especially against ranged attacks. Their main threat comes from the allies they summon and the fact that they typically operate in large combat areas, periodically teleporting to different positions. Given that they all fight among ruins, it can be challenging to locate them after they teleport, and the constant stream of summoned allies can become overwhelming. To counter this, your primary tactic should be to ignore the summoned allies entirely. Instead, use Torrent whenever possible to quickly locate the mariner, then hit them hard and fast before his friends have a chance to regroup.
Given that they all fight among ruins, it can be challenging to locate them after they teleport, and the constant stream of summoned allies can become overwhelming. To counter this, your primary tactic should be to ignore the summoned allies entirely. Instead, use Torrent whenever possible to quickly locate the mariner, then hit them hard and fast before his friends have a chance to regroup.
The seated Tibia Mariner uses an alphorn to paddle his incorporeal rowboat across ethereal, violet waters. His body is skeletonized, save for the wizened beard that clings to his slack mandible. A floral pattern decorates the white-laced chapel veil that rests upon his head and drapes over his bony frame. Attached to the veil are wide, golden hoops, each adorned with three large golden flower emblems inlaid with rubies. The mariner's forearms are wrapped in cloth, and several gold bracelets hang from his wrists. He wears the tattered remains of robes sewn from purple thread.
The mariner's transparent wooden rowboat shimmers with a faint purple hue. A chair is built into its deck, with a semi-circle cut into the backrest to create a depression at the top. Spiral patterns ascend its stile and backpost before transitioning into straight lines beaming upward. The backpost extends several feet higher than the chair and terminates in an upward concave arch reminiscent of Marika's Rune . Hanging ventrally from it is a small lantern alight with a purple ghostflame . [ 22 ] The boat's exterior hull is highly decorated with intricate relief carvings. Two adjacent floral embellishments are encircled by spiral-containing rings and bound together with a sturdy knot. The gunwale trim above features a wavelength weaving over and under stars, possibly symbolic of the Primeval Current .
The mariner will sometimes whip up a great torrent of water that carries his boat high into the air. When it reaches it apex, he extends his arm, and a bright red light emanates from a jewel in his palm. This light is said to beckon the lost spirits of those slain in battle. [ 11 ]
The dry and metallic moans of the mariner eerily echo upon themselves as if uttered from deep within a dungeon. When he sounds his lengthy brass horn, a single clang of metal deeply reverberates like a tolling bell. When cast, his ancient Death magic produces a haunting noise like the crashing of cymbals. [ 2 ]
It is unclear whether the resurgence of the mariners is linked to the boats at the Shadow Keep . It could be an act of iconoclasm, or evidence the unsung heroes of Messmer 's crusade now revere the ferrymen in their own way. [ 23 ]
It is unclear whether the Tibia Mariners played a role in delivering the Stone coffins now beached on the Cerulean Coast . [ 24 ]
They appear to be leaders among Those Who Live in Death [ 5 ] , and each one carries Deathroot .

area: Limgrave
chapter: 1
name: Bell Bearing Hunter
Bell Bearing Hunter is a recurring Field Boss in Elden Ring . He is a hunter of shopkeepers who only appears at night and features long-distance melee attacks. This is an optional boss as players don't need to defeat it to advance in Elden Ring.
He will appear only at night, so if you don't see him, make sure to rest again at the nearby Site of Grace after passing time to nightfall.
See Elemer of the Briar for the Great Enemy version of this boss. Defeating the real Elemer will not prevent the Bell Bearing Hunters from appearing, however. Despite his fearsome reputation, the Bell Bearing Hunter cannot permanently kill merchants.
See Bell Bearing Hunter Lore
Elemer murdered numerous instructors and merchants, and was known as the Bell Bearing Hunter.
Warmaster's Shack [ More Info ] [ Map Link ]
Church of Vows [ More Info ] [ Map Link ]
Hermit Merchant's Shack [ More Info ] [ Map Link ]
Isolated Merchant's Shack (Dragonbarrow) [ More Info ] [ Map Link ]
Bell Bearing Hunter only spawns provided 3 requirements (in this order it will be faster): 1. The player needs to rest at the near site of grace; 2. It must be night; 3. The player needs to trigger the title of the specific location (like "Warmaster's Shack"). Players can simply rest at the locations Site of Grace, skip time until night, then exit and re-enter the game to get the boss to spawn.
Players can simply rest at the locations Site of Grace, skip time until night, then exit and re-enter the game to get the boss to spawn.
Parryable : Yes, but 2 parries are required per stance break
Is vulnerable to a critical hit after being stance broken or parried
Damage: Standard , Strike , Pierce , Magic
See Elemer of the Briar for a full boss guide
If you can climb on nearby scenery and get above the Bell Bearing Hunter's head, none of his attacks can hit you. Use spells like Night Maiden's Mist that can hit through structures to damage him. Even if it seems like he's going out of range, you can simply wait and he will be back in a moment.
If you have sufficient health, you can use Lion's Claw to tank his hits as the startup animation has superarmor which means you can't be staggered out of it by most attacks. Hit him enough times to stance break him, perform a critical and then heal while he is getting up. You will still need enough health to tank his hits and enough damage to kill him before you run out of flasks.
The negation numbers are the % of your damage that gets blocked. For example, if a negation is 60, 40% of that damage by that type will go through and 60% will be negated. Bigger number = less damage. A negation of 100 means no damage goes through, and a negation of -100 means the enemy takes 2x damage from that source. 0 means damage goes pretty much as is.

The bell bearings earned from defeating the Bell Bearing Hunter are kept when going into New Game Plus . For those looking to follow in his footsteps, actual merchant bell bearings are not kept.
The Bell Bearing Hunter will show up if one fast travels to the site of grace while it is nighttime. As mentioned above, one will have to rest once more if they decided to rest at the site of grace until nightfall in order for the field boss to spawn.
The iteration of the Bell Bearing Hunter that shows up in Dragonbarrow is notably stronger than all other versions despite being encounterable much earlier in the game. Because of this, this fight is ill-advised for early-to-mid game players.
Defeating Elemer of the Briar has no impact on encounters with the Bell Bearing Hunter, but is necessary in order to acquire his shield , the briar set , and the Marais executioner's sword .
Battered iron armor from a foreign land. Worn by Elemer of the Briar.
The winding, rusted iron briars are a mark of the guilty and typically indicate a sentence of death. They also cause this armor to deal damage when performing dodge rolls.
Greatshield from a foreign land, used by Elemer of the Briar. Attacks with this armament utilize the iron thorns that have been wound around its frame.
Originates from Eochaid, a land of proudly solitary ascetics.
Storied sword of House Marais, the family of executioners who presided over the Shaded Castle. One of the legendary armaments.
Elemer of the Briar, the Bell Bearing Hunter, snatched the sword from the site of his looming execution, and furnished it with battle skills from his home of Eochaid..
[screenshots and artwork go here]
Elemer of the Briar is a reoccurring boss in ELDEN RING (2022) .
1 Overview 1.1 Moveset
Elemer of the Briar, also known as the Bell Bearing Hunter , originally hailed from Eochaid , a land of proudly solitary ascetics. [ 1 ] He wears iron armor wrapped in iron thorns, which are a mark of the guilty and of those sentenced to death. [ 2 ] He was slated for execution at the Shaded Castle , home of the family of House Marais, however he evaded death by snatching the sword from the site of his looming execution and furnished it with battle skills from his homeland. [ 3 ] He gained the moniker "Bell Bearing Hunter" by killing numerous merchants and instructors [ 4 ] , and taking their Bell Bearings.
Elemer can be encountered in the Castellan's Hall of the Shaded Castle, the site of his failed execution. He can also appear in various locations throughout the Lands Between , typically in places where merchants can be found.
The Bell-Bearing Hunter will only appear when resting at night; to make him reappear after being defeated yourself, rest at the grace and set the time to night and then rest again.
Can include a separate table for a specific instance of this variant's moveset.
Try to stick close to him as his ranged sword swipes are much wider and generally harder to predict.
It is possible to bait him into a cycle of repeated shield slams by getting behind him and only landing one attack (lighter weapons can possibly use an uncharged heavy attack and some skills are quick enough to also be used) after each slam. Be aware that he can also follow up with an explosion sometimes, so take a moment to see if the shield begins to glow red as he is about to pull it up.
The grab is rather hard to dodge and very delayed. Wait until his hand begins to move towards you before dodging. It is also possible to dodge by running far enough away or by being behind him.
The blade drill is hard to avoid if rolling to the right and has some reach so try to roll forward and to the left.
His shield charge is very quick so try to stay relatively close as to not provoke it.
Elemer is encountered in the hall at the top of the Shaded Castle. He can channel energy through his sword, allowing him to send it towards the player and control it at a distance, or fire a red beam by rotating it quickly.
The Bell Bearing Hunter appears at night, in the Hermit Merchant's Shack in the Capital Outskirts . The Hermit Merchant (Capital Outskirts) will disappear for the duration of the fight, but will reappear if the player dies or if they defeat the boss.
The Bell Bearing Hunter appears at night, outside the Isolated Merchant's Shack in Greyoll's Dragonbarrow . The Isolated Merchant (Dragonbarrow) will disappear for the duration of the fight, but will reappear if the player dies or if they defeat the boss.
After defeating Elemer of the Briar in Shaded Castle, the Briar Set will be available for purchase from Finger Reader Enia .
Internally referred to as "hagetakakishi", which means "vulture knight".

area: Limgrave
chapter: 1
name: Bloody Finger
Bloody Finger is a Multiplayer Item in Elden Ring . Multiplayer Items allow players to interact with each other in various ways, including leaving messages for other players to read, co-operative gameplay and competitve gameplay like PVP.
Item for online play. (Can also be used from the Multiplayer menu.)
Attempts an invasion of another player's world. If successful, you will arrive as an invader (Bloody Finger) with the objective of defeating the Host of Fingers of that world.
Glistening blood has been siphoned into the nail of this finger. Its sickly pale skin feels nothing now, but the nail still aches with sweetest pain.
Where to find Bloody Finger :
Travel to Rose Church after defeating any shardbearer and talking to Enia in the Roundtable Hold for the first time.
Speak with White Mask Varré in front of the church.
White Mask Varré will give you five Festering Bloody Fingers and ask you to invade other worlds.
There are multiple ways to complete this step; If offline, invade Magnus The Beast Claw located in Writheblood Ruins least 3 times, simply killing him works too. If online, invade at least 3 times. You do not need to successfully defeat the host; simply leaving with the Finger Severer is enough.
If offline, invade Magnus The Beast Claw located in Writheblood Ruins least 3 times, simply killing him works too.
If online, invade at least 3 times. You do not need to successfully defeat the host; simply leaving with the Finger Severer is enough.
Return to the Rose Church . Varré will give you the Lord of Blood's Favor and instruct you to soak the cloth with a maiden's blood.
There are multiple ways to complete this step; Option #1 - Chapel of Anticipation Travel Northwest to The Four Belfries . The highest belfry will have a Imbued Sword Key in a chest. The second highest belfry will transport you to the Precipice of Anticipation. After defeating the Grafted Scion , travel further to the Chapel of Anticipation . There, you will find the corpse of a maiden. Interact with her corpse to soak the Lord of Blood's Favor in her blood. Option #2 - Church of Inhibition Travel Northeast, shy of the Grand Lift, to the Church of Inhibition . In the Church of Inhibition will be a dead maiden. Interact with her corpse to soak the Lord of Blood's Favor in her blood. Option #3 - Killing a Maiden Find and kill Hyetta. Soak the Lord of Blood's Favor in her blood.

[ Elden Ring Map Here ]
You can attempt to invade another player's world.
If you successfully invade, invasion multiplayer will begin, with you as a Bloody Finger. (Your goal will be to defeat the Host of Fingers). Killing the Host of Fingers will grant the invader a Rune Arc and a Furlcalling Finger Remedy .
During invasion multiplayer, you are provided three Phantom Bloody Fingers . Using these will spawn you at another location in the same session.
Doing the quest and consequently receiving this item makes your eyes slightly redder. This effect can be disabled in the mirror in Fia's room at the Roundtable Hold .
The maximum number of invaders is 1 unless the host is using the Taunter's Tongue .
By default, invasions can only occur once the host has summoned a cooperator. Solo invasions cannot happen unless the host has used the Taunter's Tongue.
Bloody Finger is a reusable, online-only tool in ELDEN RING (2022) . This item can be used as many times as the player wishes, unlike Festering Bloody Fingers which are consumed upon use and need to be replenished.
Attempts an invasion of another player's world. If successful, your objective will be to defeat the Host of Fingers of the world to which you were summoned.
The nail of this finger is shot through with streaks of fresh, glistening blood. The finger's sickly pale skin feels nothing now, but the nail still aches with sweetest pain.
Obtained after giving Varré the Blood-Soaked Favor and joining Mohg's Bloody Fingers .
Using this item will make the player attempt to invade the world of another player, should they manage to connect then they will spawn in the other player's world as a Bloody Finger with three Phantom Bloody Fingers to use in that session. The practical and cosmetic effects are the exact same as the the Festering Bloody Finger . Differences are only found when compared against the Recusant Finger , such as the invader's title being "Bloody Finger" instead of "Recusant", the afformentioned Bloody Finger variant of the Phantom Finger , as well as a unique background song playing when the Bloody Finger engages the Host.
If the player has activated Mohg's Great Rune through the use of a Rune Arc they will also receive three Phantom Great Runes for use while invading through the Bloody Finger.
Menu icon of the Recusant Finger while it's searching for another world to invade.

area: Liurnia of the Lakes
chapter: 4
name: Liurnia of the Lakes
Liurnia of the Lakes is one of the major continental areas in the world of Elden Ring . Found northwest of the starting area of Limgrave , this region has been the common backdrop of pre-launch images of the game, notably due to the prominent placement of The Academy of Raya Lucaria overlooking the misty lake below. It can be initially accessed via the passage beneath Godrick the Grafted 's throne room in Stormveil Castle , or by following a narrow cliffside path around the east edge of the castle in northern Stormhill .
With its shallow waters and vast wetlands, the region of Liurnia is beset with the gradual sinking of most of its landmass. With its forests perpetually blanketed in fog, eerie sounds of bells can be heard in the distance.
Map (Liurnia, East) : In the southern, swampy lake, there's a monument with the map shard just by it. [ Map Link ]
Map (Liurnia, West) : In front of a monolith in the open field northeast of the Northern Liurnia Lake Shore Site of Grace . [ Map Link ]
Map (Liurnia, North) : Can be found over a grave-like big stone, at Academy Gate Town . [ Map Link ]
